questions: Your behavioral analysis indicates that you have a highly collaborative work style. Can you share an example of how you've contributed to an open-source project as part of a team?
I noticed that you have one major commit (over 500 lines) in your repository. Can you share your approach to handling large-scale changes and complex technical challenges in an open-source project?

Your GitHub analysis shows a lack of leadership-related commits, but your collaboration style is described as highly collaborative. How do you envision your role and contributions in an open-source project, especially when it comes to guiding the project's direction and mentoring other contributors?
